title: WIHP Mudziyo Wekududza Usina Miganhu
subtitle: Nyora chero shoko → Tora IPA kubva kuWiktionary → Shandura kuita Hangul!
step2c: • Yose pamwe mitauro 117 ine 100% IPA tsigiro!
canConvert: Unogona kushandura mashoko kubva mumitauro 117 yenyika, kusanganisira mitauro yeIndia inopfuura 20!
philosophy: Mashoko haafaniri kuva nemiganhu. WIHP inotenda Wiktionary IPA.
